productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Veeya Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionDeep pink round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with cap sleeves and graphic print on chestFittingRegular 98 cm (24-30 months) Wash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryIndulge the new-to-the-world feeling of your little girl in this deep pink tee from gini and jony. The GJ logo initials and "Baby born recently" slogan all add to the happy energy of this tee.  Team this with small white skirts or denim jumpers and comfy crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
